headline: TNDM Stock Down Following Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat, Gross Margin Up
summary: Tandem Diabetes beats Q1 revenue and earnings estimates as gross margin expands, but shares decline 23.6% after the results announcement.

raw.headline: TNDM Stock Down Following Q1 Earnings & Revenue Beat, Gross Margin Up
raw.summary: Tandem Diabetes beats Q1 revenue and earnings estimates as gross margin expands, but shares decline 23.6% after the results announcement.

headline: Labcorp expands Epic pact to make full test menu available on Aura
summary: The Labcorp agreement continues the expansion of Aura, which gives healthcare providers access to tests from companies including Quest Diagnostics.

raw.headline: Labcorp expands Epic pact to make full test menu available on Aura
raw.summary: The Labcorp agreement continues the expansion of Aura, which gives healthcare providers access to tests from companies including Quest Diagnostics.
